name: Cheesy Tater Topper
recipeIngredient: 1 cup skim milk, at room temperature
4 medium potatoes, baked and cut into quarters
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine milk, cornstarch, mustard, salt, and black pepper.
2. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly.
3. Add cheese, stirring until melted.
4. Stir in vegetables and heat through.
